case_title: CITY HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. JESSE OSBERRY et al

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-11-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Susan Lee. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. represented Plaintiff, City Housing Authority and Defendant, Jesse Osberry appeared in pro per. The Case settled per written stipulation of parties per the record.
